description: Ward, having been training for this moment, slips his cuffs and takes a guard's gun during the transfer. Meanwhile, Christian Ward delivers a highly publicized speech condemning his brother and vowing to fight Hydra. The episode ends with Ward’s escape looming over the team and the world watching S.H.I.E.L.D. with renewed suspicion and uncertainty.

transcript.line: It's gonna hurt. The rest probably hasn't healed yet. You sure you don't want to wait a few days?
